arts.ttl: We know we need to do better – Erik ten Hag still focused amid ‘external noise’
arts.sum: Ten Hag’s Manchester United drew 0-0 at Aston Villa on Sunday afternoon.

arts.ttl: Man Utd forced into Erik ten Hag decision after manager refuses to give them easy out
arts.sum: Manchester United manager Erik ten Hag went after a decisive result at Villa Park but a drab goalless draw changes little when it comes to the Dutchman's future

arts.ttl: Man United injury news: Red Devils suffer double blow during goalless draw with Aston Villa
arts.sum: Manchester United's Harry Maguire is spotted leaving Villa Park in a protective plastic boot after picking up an injury during Sunday's Premier League clash with Aston Villa.

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag comments on Man Utd future immediately questioned by club legend
arts.sum: Co-owner Sir Jim Ratcliffe sidestepped a question about Erik ten Hag’s position ahead of the trip to Villa Park, where he watched on as the visitors earned a point in a low-quality contest

arts.ttl: Every Aston Villa and Man United player should be 'ashamed' after bore draw
arts.sum: Former Manchester United striker Dimitar Berbatov says that 'everybody on the pitch should be ashamed' after the Red Devils drew 0-0 with Aston Villa in a dull draw which saw United veteran defender Jonny Evans be awarded the man of the match award. Join our Aston Villa WhatsApp group and get the latest breaking news, interviews and opinion sent straight to your phone, plus matchday team news and live updates of all the action.

arts.ttl: Ezri Konsa emerges as England doubt as Unai Emery provides injury update
arts.sum: Konsa suffered a hamstring issue against Manchester United three days after being named in Lee Carsley’s squad

arts.ttl: Aston Villa 0-0 Manchester United: Unai Emery content with Premier League draw after exhausting schedule
arts.sum: Aston Villa head coach Unai Emery admits that he can have few complaints with his side's goalless draw with Manchester United after their recent exhausting schedule.

arts.ttl: Man United players 'should be ASHAMED' after veteran, 36, earns man of the match, claims Dimitar Berbatov - as he insists Erik ten Hag criticism 'will only grow' after Aston Villa draw
arts.sum: Despite lacking attacking threat, it was a resolute defensive performance from United, who had conceded six goals in their previous two matches against Tottenham and Porto.

arts.ttl: Spirit and togetherness pleases Ten Hag| Villa 0 Man Utd 0
arts.sum: GOOD TEAM SPIRIT AND TOGETHERNESS We created loads of chances in our seven games but we have to step up.

arts.ttl: 'They should have told me' - Erik ten Hag addresses Manchester United future ahead of talks with Ineos
arts.sum: Man United have taken seven points from seven games in what has been their worst start to a Premier League season.
